questions.prompt: In flex-direction: column, which property centers items HORIZONTALLY?
questions.explanation: In column, the cross-axis is horizontal — so align-items handles horizontal alignment.

options: Wraps items to the next row
Reverses items on the main axis: right → left in LTR
Reverses the source order in the DOM
questions.explanation: row-reverse flips the direction items lay out, but doesn't touch the DOM.

questions.prompt: Stack these items vertically instead of horizontally.

questions.explanation: Reverses the visual order along the (now vertical) main axis.

questions.prompt: In column direction, `width: 100%` on an item does what?
questions.explanation: Cross axis in column is horizontal — 100% width fills it.

questions.prompt: Which property switches to column on narrow screens using a media query?
In row-reverse, which end do items appear at?
questions.explanation: row-reverse packs items at the (visual) right in LTR.

questions.prompt: In column direction, `justify-content: space-between` distributes items:
questions.explanation: Main axis in column direction is vertical.
